titleStmt.title: SII 10.739: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu

No. 739. (A.R. No. 335 of 1919.) ON A PILLAR IN THE MAṆḌAPA IN FRONT OF THE WESTERN GŌPURA IN THE TEMPLE OF BHĪMĒŚVARA, DRĀKSHĀRĀMA, RAMACHANDRAPURAM TALUK, EAST GODAVARI DISTRICT. Aṅka year 10 of Mukundadēva.

summary.p: Records that king Mukundadēva remitted the marriage and pānu duties payable by the Balija-pekkaṇḍru and others in twenty-one places in the Rājamahēndrāvara-daṇḍapāṭa. The remission was made after the king's conquest of Gauḍa-dēśa and performing the pearl-tulāpurusha.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu śrīgaṇādhipati śrībhīmēśvara
vīraśrīgajapatigauḍēśvara navakōṭika
¨rnnāṇṭakalubarigēśvara śrīvīramuku
ṁddagajapatimahādēvu vijaya
subharājyasamasta 10 Aṁka śrāhi .
makara di 5 kri 7 gu . śrīvīramukuṁddadēvu
mahārājuluṁgāru gaUḍa sādhiṁcci
gauḍīśvarunki AbhayaAstamu yicci gaṁ

ggalōnu mutyālatulāpurṣaṁ modalaina
ṣōḍaśamahādānāluṁnnu cēśi kaṭakaśi
ṁhvāsanāśīnulai vijayaśubharājyamucēyu
cu nuṁḍḍi rājamahēṁdrāvarapudaṁḍḍapāṭa 21
sthalāla baliṁjapekkaṁḍṛ modalaina nānāpāṭakā
laprajalakunnu peṁḍliśuṁkhālu pānu
suṁkkālunnu tama tāta siṁggarājuṁgāri
kinni tama taṁḍri sarvarājuṁgārikinni tama ta
lli sarvādēviṁgārikinni tamakunnu puṇyamau
naṭṭugānu śrīpuruṣōttamamaṁddula śrījagannādhu
ni sannidhini ĀcaṁdrākkasthāIgānu mānitimi ganaka peṁḍliṁ
ḍlucēsi dha¨rmma
Digital edition of SII 10.739 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
